scene.message: Maki: Chisato...{wait_fr:32} it couldn't{nl} be, could it!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Somehow it feels like{nl} I'm having a bad dream.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: And here we've got no{nl} time to spare!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Damn it, what "palace"?{nl} Don't make me laugh!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: She must be quite{nl} confident in her paintings.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I'm so glad we can get{nl} outside now!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Owww, my ankle hurts~!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ayase's maybe just a{nl} teensy bit jealous~{waitkey}{ret}
